utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay . Then I guess it is just , wait here then . Hi . I need one fake ticket to Yemen .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I need one fake ticket to Yemen .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no ... no ... no , no . No , no , no , I just , I just need a pretend ticket .

utterances.speaker: Ticket Counter Attendant
utterances.text: I am sorry sir , I do not understand .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What would you give to a kid if he wanted a ticket to play with ?

utterances.speaker: Ticket Counter Attendant
utterances.text: Are you travelling with a child ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_What would you give to a kid if he wanted a ticket to play with ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right , you know what , she is gonna think that I am handing you a credit card , but what I am really gonna do is hand you a library card .
